focus_intent: P0 FULLY SHIPPED in one autonomous /loop iteration on first lane resume. Lane is now in a 'waiting for operator' state — every pre-farm deliverable is on disk + smoke-tested. The two operator-blockers: (a) connect the Mac farm + drop _vault/farm-ssh/<host>.meta.json to unlock P1; (b) run `cd dashboard && npm install` to materialise the Next.js node_modules so the operator can browser-smoke the dashboard. After (a): execute plans/p1-readonly-acceptance.md §0-§6 (5 quick SSH+SQL smokes); P1 closes within 20-40 min. After P1: P2 (send) → P3 (daemon) → P4 (cross-lane) — each plan is pre-written so unlock is single-step.
